Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order 1) Transferring Action To Contra Costa Cournt And 2) Imposing Sanctions Against Pltf'S Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mary Wright, Esq., Carroll, Burdick, & McDonough, (415) 743-2508, for Defendants and Moving Parties Matt Keeperman, The National Collection Agency, Inc., Fred Keeperman, and Valerie Soss
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS MATT KEEPERMAN, THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY INC., FRED KEEPERMAN, and VALERIE SOSS' Motion For Order Transferring Action To Contra Costa Court And Imposing Sanctions Against Plaintiff's Counsel: Motion to Tranfer Action is GRANTED. Motion for sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff shall pay all costs to transfer this action to Contra Costa Court and Attorney Wright is awarded reasonable attorney's fee for today's appearance. Prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order. (301/JLW/X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
